Name: Easing Graph tool
Description:
A set of high-performance, reusable easing functions designed for Unity Graph editors to simplify procedural animation and VFX. The Easing Graph library is easy to integrate and follows standard Unity design, making the workflow intuitive and seamless.

Documentation: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1_Nran_VnYlj_umnT3s7W3gm2Vkj28QzgvBopOQMPHtA/edit?usp=sharing

Website: https://shakoretka.github.io/SwiftXF/

Engene: Unity
Tools: Shader Graph, VFX Graph, HLSL

Name: Paralax Sword
Description:
A parallax effect on the blade, showcasing the depth and dynamics of outer space. Utilizing Screen Space coordinates, it creates a 'window into another dimension' effect. A detailed article on the implementation of this effect is available at the link: 
https://dtf.ru/gamedev/4110492-prostranstva-v-kompyuternoy-grafike 

Engine: UE5
Tools: Material Graph, Blender, Photoshop, PixPlant, GPT

Name: Hex SiFi Shield
Description:
An advanced pulsing hex-shell effect featuring independent plates, implemented entirely within the shader as a single entity to minimize draw calls.

Engine: Unity
Tools: Shader Graph, VFX Graph, Blender, Photoshop

Name: Plasma Gun
Description:
A stylized, multi-component plasma pistol shot with a full integration cycle into game logic, accounting for collisions, orientation, and spatial context.

Engine: Unity
Tools: Shader Graph, Particle System, Blender, Photoshop, Substance Designer

Name: Water Tunel
Description:
A dynamic water tunnel that opens before the viewer on the water's surface, specifically developed for VR. It implements a variety of techniques with a heavy emphasis on advanced mathematics, bone animation, particle systems, and more.

Engine: Unity
Tools: Shader Graph, VFX Graph, Blender, Photoshop, Substance Designer, Crest

Name: Fireworks
Description:
A firework effect focused on realism and the performance constraints of VR devices. The task was accomplished by leveraging GPU power and meticulous profiling of the particle system.

Engine: Unity
Tools: Shader Graph, VFX Graph, Photoshop

Name: Fire Ring
Description:
A semi-stylized ring of fire that gradually dissipates into individual tongues of flame and glowing sparks.

Engine: Unity
Tools: Shader Graph, VFX Graph, Photoshop, Substance Designer

Name: Game of Life
Description:
Conway's Game of Life cellular automaton. Implemented using compute shaders, enabling parallel processing of each cell's state across vast areas. Initial cell distribution is controlled by a seed utilizing procedural noise.

You can try it out by downloading the project at: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1QNvuFNfBiSn25daHtB4b8bfkUZNc2gWj/view?usp=sharing

Engine: Unity
Tools: Compute Shaders

Name: Article: "Coordinate Spaces"
Description:
https://dtf.ru/gamedev/4110492-prostranstva-v-kompyuternoy-grafike

The article explains the fundamental concept of coordinate spaces in 3D graphics. It covers key spaces—World, Object/Local, Camera/View, and Tangent—detailing their differences and use cases. The role of Transforms and transformation matrices is described separately, along with practical examples of applying this knowledge in shaders.

Name: Article: "LCD Display Shader"
Description:
https://dtf.ru/gamedev/2316387-kak-napisat-sheider-lcd-displeya

The article explores the practical creation of an LCD display simulation shader in Unity using ShaderGraph, fundamental shader techniques, and mathematics. It demonstrates how to achieve pixelation through UV coordinate posterization and transform them into a pixel grid.

UnityPackage with the shader implementation: https://github.com/76invaders/LCDScreenShader

Name: Article: "Flow Mapping"
Description:
https://dtf.ru/gamedev/2299716-sheider-potochnogo-dvizheniya-ili-floumaping

The article explains the flow-mapping effect as a technique to create the illusion of fluid motion or flow in shaders without animating geometry. The material is accompanied by examples demonstrating how simple mathematical operations significantly enhance the visual dynamics of a scene.

UnityPackage and GLSL file with the shader implementation: https://github.com/76invaders/FlowmapShaderDemo
